failures.description: The agent made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch invocation by missing the required item_id and passing product_id with the wrong value and type.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The goal and plan were correct at index 1: use ProductCatalogSearch with item_id 1096508426 and product_id 1808611083. At index 2, all required information was already available, but the agent prepared a malformed tool call with args {"product_id": 0}, omitting the required item_id and changing product_id from a string ID to integer 0. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError at index 3. The error was not resolved later.
